title: tabernaemontana peschiera
intro: Tabernaemontana peschiera, also known as the 'Yellow Form' of the Yellow Form Tabernaemontana, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana peschiera include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for medicinal use.
